evidence: We use generative artificial intelligence and/or machine learning (collectively, AI) tools in our investment and capital allocation decisions and operations, including commercially available AI applications or AI features available through our existing software or technology platforms.
We utilize software and platforms designed to detect such cybersecurity threats, including AI-based tools

We use generative artificial intelligence and/or machine learning tools in our investment and capital allocation decisions and operations, including commercially available AI applications or AI features available through our existing software or technology platforms.
While we have adopted a governance framework concerning use of AI tools and provide training to our employees to guard against the aforementioned risks
If AI tools used by our peers to optimize decisions or operations are used more broadly or effectively than the AI tools we use, we may be competitively disadvantaged.
The adoption of AI tools by our tenants may lead to infrastructure requirements that our buildings currently do not accommodate, such as increased power needs for high-performance computing.

The adoption of AI tools by our tenants may also lead to a reconfiguration in space requirements by our tenants or decreased demand for space over time... material adverse effect on our business, results of operations, and financial condition.

capex_mentions.quote: Infrastructure upgrades may require significant capital expenditures and could potentially impact the environmental footprint of our building operations.
capex_mentions.context: Tenant AI adoption driving potential building infrastructure upgrades; no dollar amount specified

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount tied to AI investment disclosed; named use of commercially available AI tools and a governance framework are present but no proprietary AI build-out or quantified spend is described.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named initiatives (investment/capital allocation decisions, cybersecurity detection) are described but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are provided; some language remains general.

Excerpts are predominantly from risk_factors and item_16 sections; no MD&A or business-section detail on AI strategy or financials was included, which may understate investment intensity and concreteness.
